audio_direction: Layered original strategy pulse with restrained low percussion, short readable impacts, bright economy confirmation and a ceremonial era chord

assets.rights_note: Original waveform synthesized specifically for this project by scripts/generate-audio.mjs; no sampled third-party material
assets.modifications: Mono 22050 Hz PCM, periodic rhythm and pitched voices, short edge fade
assets.loop_notes: Full 12-second file loops; edges fade over 80 ms to prevent clicks

assets.rights_note: Original noise and sine transient synthesized specifically for this project
assets.modifications: Pitch and volume variation applied at runtime; event rate limited

assets.rights_note: Original two-stage pitched confirmation synthesized specifically for this project
assets.modifications: Repeated kill events are grouped by a 110 ms limiter and receive slight pitch variation

assets.rights_note: Original four-note chord synthesized specifically for this project
assets.modifications: Fixed pitch ceremonial playback for conquest; runtime gain limited

assets.rights_note: Original rising sine transient synthesized specifically for this project
assets.modifications: Short unlooped confirmation with a dedicated UI gain bus

audio_requirements.role: Persistent musical identity after the first user gesture
Ceremonial sector, era and prestige confirmation
Short confirmation for purchases and navigation
